implementation_notes: Implemented all three concrete classes per spec. Private _to_date() and _iter_dates() helpers added. SimpleExecutionModel fills at close price with None-bar skip. InMemoryPortfolioBook tracks cash/holdings/last_prices with NAV computation. SymbolBacktestEngine drives strict 6-step event loop per date, returns BacktestResult with final_nav/total_return/num_trades. equity_curve_ref=None always. interfaces.py and schema/models.py untouched.
test_evidence: 5 targeted tests pass. Full suite: 222 passed, 0 failed, 5 warnings (pre-existing utcnow deprecation).
